parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "business_name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.business_name) }},
  "category":      {{ JSON.stringify($json.category) }},
  "phone":         {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone) }},
  "email":         {{ JSON.stringify($json.email) }},
  "website":       {{ JSON.stringify($json.website) }},
  "domain":        {{ JSON.stringify($json.domain) }},
  "city":          {{ JSON.stringify($json.city) }},
  "state":         {{ JSON.stringify($json.state) }},
  "source":        "apify",
  "status":        {{ JSON.stringify($json.status) }}
}

parameters.subject: =✅ Glow Guys Import Done: {{ $json.total_saved }} New | {{ $json.total_duplicates }} Already Existed | {{ $json.total_skipped }} Skipped
parameters.message:
=

Glow Guys Lead Import — Complete

Search: {{ $json.searchDescription }}

Dataset ID: {{ $json.datasetId }}

Run at: {{ $json.run_date }}

📊 Import Summary

{{ $json.total_failed > 0 ? `` : '' }}
Total fetched from Apify {{ $json.total_raw }}
Passed validation {{ $json.total_valid }}
📞 Phone leads (act immediately) {{ $json.phone_leads }}
📧 Email-only leads (enrich later) {{ $json.email_only_leads }}
✅ Newly saved to Supabase {{ $json.total_saved }}
⏭️ Already existed (duplicates) {{ $json.total_duplicates }}
🚫 Filtered out before save {{ $json.total_skipped }}
❌ Save errors${$json.total_failed}
{{ Object.keys($json.skip_reasons).length > 0 ? `

🚫 Why Leads Were Filtered

${Object.entries($json.skip_reasons).map(([reason, count]) => ``).join('')}
Reason Count
${reason}${count}
` : '' }} {{ $json.skipped_details && $json.skipped_details.length > 0 ? `

📋 Filtered Leads Detail

${$json.skipped_details.map(s => ``).join('')}
Business Reason
${s.name}${s.reason}
` : '' }}

View phone leads in Supabase: status = new
View email-only leads: status = email_only
